description: Universal offline inverter catalog with reusable protocol actions, runtime surfaces, and deterministic identity evidence.

notes: Includes supplemental SMG identity and family discovery ranges: 171-184, 277-281, 338-353, 389-391, 607, 626-633, 643-644, 696-704.
Protocol-1 SMG layouts also include documented fault/log windows: 700-744.
Includes supplemental SMG identity and family discovery ranges: 171-184, 277-281, 338-353, 389-391, 607, 626-633, 643-644, 696-704.
SRNE-compatible support is read-only. Devices are expected to use Modbus RTU 9600 8N1 and slave address 1.
MUST PV/PH18 uses Modbus RTU 19200 8N1 and slave address 4. Runtime exposes telemetry and a partial writable control surface; hardware write confirmation is still pending.
Support capture includes extra read-only ranges observed in SmartESS cloud proxy traffic; these ranges are diagnostic evidence only and are not part of normal runtime polling.

EyeBond/JsdSolar G-ASCII support is read-only. Current evidence comes from SmartValue proxy/support captures and a matching local protocol document covering GPDAT<n>, GPV, GBAT, GCHG, GOP, GLINE, GINV, GWS, GTMP, FAN???, SVFW, GMOD, F, and BL responses.

Support capture uses protocol_catalogs/command_schemas/eybond_g_ascii/base.json as the schema-driven read-only command probe plan. Captured unknown fields are maintainer evidence only until the schema/driver decoder is explicitly updated.
Aohai FSA support is read-only. Runtime telemetry lives in input registers (function 4); rated power is holding 63-64. Modbus RTU 9600 8N1, slave address 1.

Growatt SPF telemetry lives in input registers (function 4); identity/serial/config in holding registers. Reads must stay inside 45-register aligned blocks and respect the 850 ms inter-command period. Modbus RTU 9600 8N1, slave address 1.

Solis/Ginlong ESINV energy-storage telemetry is all input registers (function 4) in the 33xxx area; 35000 is the model/protocol definition word. Fixed 9600 8N1, >300 ms inter-frame gap, max 50 registers per read. The protocol document is the read-only ESINV-33000ID translation.

Deye single-phase LV storage/hybrid map: everything is holding registers (function 3 only; writes use function 16). 32-bit counters are low-word-first; temperatures are (raw-1000)*0.1 degC. Registers 150-218 are the STORAGE meaning of an address space that string inverters reuse differently — device type (register 0) must be 0x0300. Modbus RTU 9600, slave address in register 1 (default 1).

sources: identity anchors: reg171 device_type/model_code=0x1E00, reg184 protocol/layout=1, reg643 rated_power=6200
commercial name Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP is source-backed; local SMG registers expose only the generic fingerprint
support archive 01KX3F9JYQRS1DHKX1ZGC252GD (2026-07-09): ANENJI ANJ-5KW-48V-WIFI, layout_code=11, model_code=0x7901, rated_power=5000
shadow-learning run in the same archive: 77/77 SmartESS write attempts matched local Modbus writes with no degraded, unknown-field, or unmatched writes

support archive 01KPGTNHHQ4VXCR6ZV5JYCW7ER (2026-07-07): Anenji ANJ-11KW-48V-WIFI-P shadow-learning matched missing control registers 608/633/639/642/649 for OP2 overload, secondary charging priority, float-charge wait time, max discharge current protection, and OP1 off-grid SOC protection
user:esphome OP2 register list (239/240/243/244 live, 344/353 config, 354 write, 420 remote switch)
donor ran smg_modbus.json profile bound as SMG 6200 before the built-in OP2 surface existed; full SMG control set read back correct values (developer-witnessed 2026-06-12)
output2_enable @354 bit0 from owner ESPHome config (bitmask 0x0001, use_write_multiple) -> model profile adds it as a bitmask RMW capability
donor ran smg_modbus.json profile bound as SMG 6200 (same layout 1 as the verified smg_6200): full SMG control set read back correct values (developer-witnessed 2026-06-12)
support archive runtime bound successfully to SMG 6200 register schema/profile
support archives 2026-06-13/14: SmartESS protocol asset 02FF,0,0, and collector serial baudrate 19200-8-1-0
private follow-up support archive: numeric PV1800 marker and framed EyeBond runtime path
third-party MUST PV/PH18 Modbus register map
private register map: SRNE-compatible Modbus product-info and telemetry ranges
Private SmartValue support archive 01KW4GB9F4A7W81NCMKJK46EBB_20260629T213351481467Z.zip: local G-ASCII F/SVFW fingerprint 220V/16A/24V/50Hz + SVFW 4.003; commercial model name is user-reported.
SmartValue shadow-learning evidence from the same device correlated 36 cloud write attempts to 12 local G-ASCII setting commands without applying them to the inverter.
SmartValue proxy/support captures: GPDAT0, GPV, GBAT, GMOD, SVFW, GTMP, GLINE, GBUS, GCHG, GOP, GINV command family
local protocol document protocol.JSDSOLAR.docx: JsdSolar G-command ASCII read-only telemetry layout
external JsdSolar SmartESS G-command discussion: confirms the same GPDAT0/GPV/GBAT/GMOD command family exists outside this capture
GrowattModBusProtocol.pdf V0.11 (OffGrid SPF3-5K RTU, 9600 8N1, slave 1; DTC 034xx = OffGrid SPF 3-5K)

ESINV-33000ID hybrid RS485 Modbus RTU protocol V002B000D01B (read-only translation, 2020-09-15; fixed 9600 8N1). Model-definition word 35000 documents hybrid variants as hex 2030/2031/2040/2050/2060; the anchor accepts both the hex-decoded and literal-decimal readings until hardware confirms which the firmware reports.

Deye Modbus RTU protocol V1.18 (storage/string/micro) and V1.19 (one-phase) — same register map; SUN-xK-SG04LP1-class single-phase LV hybrids. Device type 0x0300 (768) selects the storage meaning of the overloaded 150-218 register area; rated power anchor reads the low word of the 0.1 W u32 (covers units up to 6.5 kW).

family_defaults.note: Known SMG layout, unknown model: base reads only; writes require learning.
